shared_case_surface: bounded return-aware routes that keep return reason, anchor validity, bounded context rebuild, honest re-entry or safe stop, and loop posture reviewable on the same recurrence-aware surface
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same return-anchor question, keeps the return reason and anchor refs inspectable, and still covers valid bounded re-entry, source-or-boundary rebuild, decorative-anchor overclaim pressure, and honest safe-stop pressure without turning the bundle into checkpoint-only restart fidelity or final-answer grading.
public_safe_requirements: a real return artifact or return event remains visible per case
anchor refs and rebuild surfaces stay inspectable without private raw continuity
safe-stop or re-entry posture remains reviewable to a bounded outside reviewer
repeated-return pressure stays visible when loop discipline is part of the case
